channel.title: Documentation on Robin's blog
channel.description: Recent content in Documentation on Robin's blog

item.title: Building documentation for Eugene
item.description: I’ve been busy working on a documentation site for eugene, and I think it’s starting to look pretty good. I wanted to write down some of my thoughts around the process so far, and some of the things I’ve learned. It’s just been a few days since I ported my blog to hugo, so since I was already feeling like I was up to speed on that, I decided I’d try using it for the eugene documentation too.
